properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 68/24
 1. M/V RAMFORM HYPERION IS CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS FROM 17 JUNE 2024.TOWING 15 SESMIC CABLES AT 6NM LENGTH AND 1NM WIDTH 
 IN AREA BOUNDED BY: 

 A. 63-14N 005-30E.
 B. 63-14N 007-10E.
 C. 63-40N 007-10E.
 D. 64-44N 008-45E.
 E. 65-32N 007-46E.
 F. 65-32N 007-27E.
 G. 65-11N 006-07E.
 H. 64-40N 005-26E.
 I. 63-14N 005-30E.

 2.WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 7NM ASTERN AND 3NM MILES AHEAD AND BOTH SIDES. SUPPORT VESSELS M/V THOR MAGNI AND M/V 7-WAVES.
 VHF WORKING CHANNELS 72 AND 16

 3.END OF SEISMIC SURVEY: UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE
